features.name: Harness Baseline
features.description: Agent startup docs, state files, and verification commands are in place for the D&D RAG assistant

features.name: Backend Chat Flow
features.description: Keep FastAPI routes thin while the RAG pipeline and source metadata stay in backend service modules
features.evidence: Backend deployment config added at src/backend/railway.json with nested build/deploy Railway settings, and backend startup was hardened by deferring RAG initialization until request time.

features.name: Frontend Chat UI
features.description: Keep chat rendering, markdown support, and styling separated in the React app
features.evidence: Partial frontend chat UI work: local /roll commands, keep/drop dice modifiers, stat-roll command, dice picker, static header component, sticky header layout, dice info overlay, frontend Railway config, and configurable backend API URL support added.

features.name: Reusable D&D Cards
features.description: Build reusable spell, monster, weapon, item, NPC, and character card components with future action buttons

features.name: Verification Coverage
features.description: Add tests and smoke checks for API behavior, frontend builds, markdown rendering, and graceful error handling

features.name: Character Sheet Window
features.description: Open the standalone D&D character sheet inside the chat app from a header button without disrupting the existing RAG flow
